lineage_proof.detail: Lineage proof ties the exact base-lane closeout, accepted checkpoint, plugin-conditioned stage ids, continuation eval pack, and later reference-program run into one bounded review surface.

evidence_artifacts.detail: Base-lane closeout proves the accepted pretrain checkpoint came from the retained actual-lane rehearsal.
Continuation handoff binds the accepted checkpoint to the frozen `pretrain -> general_sft -> agentic_sft` target.
Continuation alignment for the exact reviewed run keeps the reasoning bridge, plugin-conditioned stage, and later reference surface together.
Reasoning-SFT bundle keeps the `general_sft` bridge explicit in the rehearsal evidence family.
Canonical plugin-conditioned stage manifest keeps the bounded `general_sft -> agentic_sft` lane explicit.
Plugin-conditioned run bundle keeps the retained stage receipt and completion digests explicit.
Continuation eval pack keeps bounded reasoning, plugin interpretation, rollout lineage, and post-training consistency review explicit.

closeout_gates.detail: Base-lane closeout reached `base_lane_rehearsal_complete` before continuation review consumed the handoff.
Accepted checkpoint ref matches across the base-lane closeout, handoff, and continuation alignment bundle.
Continuation alignment bundle matches the exact reviewed run id, continuation target id, and accepted checkpoint lineage.
Plugin-conditioned stage manifest matches the frozen handoff target and exact stage ids reviewed by the rehearsal.
One mismatched alignment candidate produced retained refusal evidence instead of silently widening the continuation claim.

failure_drills.detail: Rehearsal retained a mismatched accepted-checkpoint alignment candidate and its refusal packet before the bounded continuation proof was marked green.

can_now_claim: The actual-lane accepted checkpoint now has one separately retained continuation-handoff rehearsal packet that preserves exact lineage into the frozen plugin-conditioned `general_sft -> agentic_sft` lane.
The continuation proof now cites one exact base-lane closeout bundle, one exact accepted-checkpoint handoff, and one exact continuation alignment bundle without redefining the base lane.
A mismatched alignment candidate now produces retained refusal evidence instead of silently passing continuation review.
still_out_of_scope: plugin-conditioned RL execution on the actual pretraining lane
promotion beyond the bounded `general_sft -> agentic_sft` continuation target
claim_boundary: This bundle proves one bounded continuation-handoff rehearsal above the accepted actual pretraining checkpoint. It keeps exact lineage into the frozen plugin-conditioned `general_sft -> agentic_sft` lane plus one retained mismatch refusal packet. It does not claim cluster-scale continuation execution, plugin-conditioned RL execution, or promotion beyond the bounded continuation target.
detail: Continuation-handoff rehearsal keeps the base-lane proof gate separate while still proving that the accepted checkpoint maps into the canonical plugin-conditioned continuation lane with retained refusal evidence.
